titles.en: Chapter on What Has Been Narrated About One Who Performs Hajj with Illicit Wealth
Chapter on What Has Been Narrated About One Who Performs Hajj with Illicit Wealth

segments: ُوا : «مَنْ حَجَّ بِمَالٍ حَرَامٍ نُودِيَ عِنْدَ اَلتَّلْبِيَةِ لاَ لَبَّيْكَ عَبْدِي وَ لاَ سَعْدَيْكَ ».
arabic.text: ُوا : «مَنْ حَجَّ بِمَالٍ حَرَامٍ نُودِيَ عِنْدَ اَلتَّلْبِيَةِ لاَ لَبَّيْكَ عَبْدِي وَ لاَ سَعْدَيْكَ ».

segments: Hadith.2557 - It is narrated from the Imams (as) that they said: "Whoever performs Hajj with unlawful wealth will be called at the time of Talbiyah: 'No Labbaik for you, My servant, and no happiness for you.'"
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Hadith.2557 - It is narrated from the Imams (as) that they said: "Whoever performs Hajj with unlawful wealth will be called at the time of Talbiyah: 'No Labbaik for you, My servant, and no happiness for you.'"

narratorChain.raw: 2557 - رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلْأَئِمَّةِ عَلَيْهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُمْ قَال
